subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Java – Gaming
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: FrostByte Games
ROLE: Senior Software Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / remote
RATE: 1000 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, AWS and Kafka.

Key requirements:
• Java
• AWS
• Kafka

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Axel Björk
IT Sourcing Specialist
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 70 455 67 89
